name: mcp__safari__safari_execute_script
description: Execute arbitrary JavaScript inside the active Safari tab. Returns the script's evaluated result.

args.description: Positional arguments forwarded to the script (missing items — the original bug).

_source: Faithful reproduction of the schema that triggered HTTP 400 on convertmodel.net during the 118-tool REPL load (commit f0f50b3). `properties.args` declares type:array with no items field.
